Featured Products
View All
32*40 I
The high performance, cost-effective SAVEMA Thermal Transfer Overprinters (TTOs) are versatile enough for printing fixed and variable text, data, and graphics. It is ideal for reproducing bar codes, real-time, sell-by dates, batch numbers, prices, source codes and much more. Two-component models of brackets (Intermittent & Continuous)  can be easily integrated into machines such as vertical and horizontal form-fill-seal systems, primary labelers, thermoformers, and overwrapping equipment. The units are suitable for all intermittent applications within the food, pharmaceutical cosmetics, and automobile spare parts industries and have the capability to code all kinds of 1D/2D barcodes and Datamatrix codes.
Review
128*125 I
The high performance, cost-effective SAVEMA Thermal Transfer Overprinters (TTOs) are versatile enough for printing fixed and variable text, data, and graphics. It is ideal for reproducing bar codes, real-time, sell-by dates, batch numbers, prices, source codes and much more. Two-component models of brackets (Intermittent & Continuous)  can be easily integrated into machines such as vertical and horizontal form-fill-seal systems, primary labelers, thermoformers, and overwrapping equipment. The units are suitable for all intermittent applications within the food, pharmaceutical cosmetics, and automobile spare parts industries and have the capability to code all kinds of 1D/2D barcodes and Datamatrix codes.
Review
53 C AB
The high performance, low-cost SAVEMA Thermal Transfer Overprinters (TTOs) are versatile enough for printing fixed and variable text, data, and graphics. It is ideal for reproducing bar codes, real-time, sell-by dates, batch numbers, prices, source codes and much more. The units are suitable for all auto bagger applications within the food, pharmaceutical cosmetics, and automobile spare parts industries has the capability to code all kinds of 1D/2D barcodes and 2D data matrix codes.

about.text:
Savema | About Us
About Us
Your browser does not support video playback.
WHO WE ARE?
About Us
Savema Markalama ve Kodlama Makinaları San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., embodied all kinds of sections like electronical, mechanical, software and can design according to customer requests. SAVEMA has concluded TTO product portfolio with 32mm, 53mm, 107mm and 128mm printers today. Besides these products, SAVEMA has Traverse Thermal Transfer Printers and Feeder&Conveyor Belt Systems that can be used with TTO and Ink-jet systems.
Due to our exclusive focus on Thermal Transfer Overprinter technology, SAVEMA continuously developing new ways to apply this superior digital technology.
Savema Markalama ve Kodlama Makinaları San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., printers are the most effective way to print variable bar codes, text and graphics, real time, sell-by dates, batch numbers, prices, source codes and much more information  on flexible packaging film and labels.
"We are designing the future of industrial coding."
OUR HERITAGE
History
Savema Markalama ve Kodlama Makinaları San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., has been founded in 1995 by Mr. Mustafa SAĞBİLİ and lead into the sector with producing packaging machines. Company always aimed to produce that is not produced in Turkey and achieved firsts. In 2006, it has been identified the need of Coding in this sector and organized a team. After 3 years research and development, first machine has been produced and succeeded another achievement.
Savema Markalama ve Kodlama Makinaları San. Tic. Ltd. Sti., embodied all kinds of sections like electronical, mechanical, software and can design according to customer requests. The first target is; to conclude producement of all the range of Thermal Transfer Overprinters. Today SAVEMA has concluded TTO product portfolio with 32mm, 53mm, 107mm and 128mm printers. Besides these products, SAVEMA has Traverse Thermal Transfer Printers and Feeder&Conveyor Belt Systems that can be used with TTO and Ink-jet systems.
